PROBLEMS.TITLE: Do you recognize yourself in these situations?
PROBLEMS.SUBTITLE: Manual management makes you lose time, money and peace of mind

WHO_PAID.TITLE: Who paid?
WHO_PAID.DESCRIPTION: You never know exactly who is up to date with their payments

UNTIL_WHEN.TITLE: Until when?
UNTIL_WHEN.DESCRIPTION: Impossible to know until what date a tenant is covered

NO_PROOF.TITLE: No proof
NO_PROOF.DESCRIPTION: No reliable documents to justify payments

MENTAL_MANAGEMENT.TITLE: Mental management
MENTAL_MANAGEMENT.DESCRIPTION: Everything relies on your memory and handwritten notebooks

RESULT.TITLE: Result: Permanent stress and invisible losses
RESULT.DESCRIPTION: Frequent conflicts • Lack of control • Poorly tracked money • Constant frustration

SOLUTION.TITLE: Ndewa360: Your real estate management assistant
SOLUTION.SUBTITLE: A simple platform that centralizes everything: properties, tenants, payments, contracts and statistics

FEATURE_1.DESCRIPTION: No more manual calculations! Instantly visualize who has paid, until when, and how much you still need to receive.

FEATURE_2.DESCRIPTION: Instantly generate all your documents: contracts, invoices, receipts. Never again manual paperwork!

FEATURE_3.DESCRIPTION: Whether you're in Douala, Paris or New York, manage your properties as if you were on site. 24/7 mobile access.

TESTIMONIALS.TITLE: They have regained control of their rents
TESTIMONIALS.SUBTITLE: Discover how Ndewa360 has transformed the management of hundreds of property owners

TESTIMONIAL_1.NAME: Madame Tchouamo
TESTIMONIAL_1.QUOTE: Thanks to Ndewa360, I no longer write rental contracts. They are directly generated online and I just have to send them to the tenant. In addition to that, I no longer have to worry about an Excel file to report rent payments and calculate them. Everything is now very simple and easy.

TESTIMONIAL_2.NAME: Sévérin Nguendap
TESTIMONIAL_2.QUOTE: Not being on site to manage my property, I entrusted it to a person who did not provide me with complete follow-up and I was lost in the follow-up because I did not know exactly who owes how much and on what date. Thanks to Ndewa360, I now sleep peacefully because I know exactly the financial state of my property and my tenants.

PRICING.TITLE: Transparent and fair pricing
PRICING.SUBTITLE: All features for everyone. You only pay if you generate revenue.

GUARANTEE.TITLE: No commitment — automatic return to free plan
GUARANTEE.DESCRIPTION: 60 days to test all Premium features with no credit card. At the end of the trial, automatic return to the Freemium plan.

FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.SUBTITLE: Everything you need to know about Ndewa360

ACCESS.QUESTION: How can I access Ndewa360?
ACCESS.ANSWER: Ndewa360 is accessible from any device: smartphone, tablet or computer. No installation required, everything works in your web browser. Your data is synchronized in real time on all your devices.

PAYMENT.QUESTION: How does the "2% of rent" payment work?
PAYMENT.ANSWER: You only pay for units that generate revenue. If you have 10 apartments but only 7 are occupied, you only pay for the 7 occupied ones. Empty apartment = 0 FCFA. It's a fair model that grows with your success.

SECURITY.QUESTION: Is my data secure?
SECURITY.ANSWER: Absolutely. Your data is encrypted with the same standards as banks (SSL 256-bit), backed up daily and hosted on secure servers. We comply with GDPR and never share your information.

IMPORT.QUESTION: Can I import my existing data?
IMPORT.ANSWER: Yes! Our team helps you for free to migrate all your data from Excel, Word, notebooks or any other system. Migration is usually done in less than 24 hours and we take care of everything.

SUPPORT.QUESTION: What support do you offer?
SUPPORT.ANSWER: Email support for all users, 24/7 priority support for Premium users, plus personalized training and onboarding assistance. Our team speaks French and knows the African context.

COUNTRIES.QUESTION: Does Ndewa360 work in all African countries?
COUNTRIES.ANSWER: Yes, Ndewa360 works in all countries. Currencies, date formats and local regulations are taken into account. We have users in Senegal, Ivory Coast, Mali, Burkina Faso, Cameroon and many other countries.

HERO.TITLE: Let's revolutionize real estate in Cameroon
HERO.SUBTITLE: Help us create Africa's leading platform for smart property management and leasing with immersive 360° tours

VISION.VISION_TEXT: To become Africa's leading platform for smart property management and leasing, connecting owners and tenants through an immersive, transparent and inclusive digital experience.
VISION.MISSION_TEXT: Simplify and digitalize rental management by offering a complete platform that allows you to search, explore, rent and manage real estate with complete confidence.
VISION.IMPACT_TEXT: Transforming the lives of thousands of African families by making access to housing simpler, transparent and equitable through technological innovation.

FEATURES.VR_TOURS_DESC: Facilitating access to housing thanks to revolutionary virtual tours
FEATURES.MOBILE_PAYMENTS_DESC: Secure transactions via Orange Money and MTN Mobile Money
FEATURES.ANALYTICS_DESC: Supporting owners with automated financial analyzes
FEATURES.ECOSYSTEM_DESC: Create a transparent and equitable environment for all

PRODUCT.TITLE: See Ndewa360 in action
PRODUCT.SUBTITLE: Discover how Ndewa360 is revolutionizing property management with cutting-edge technologies and a user-centric approach

FEATURES.SMART_SEARCH_DESC: Intelligent search engine with advanced filters (city, type, price, availability) and precise geolocation.
FEATURES.DASHBOARD_DESC: Comprehensive dashboard with monthly revenue, occupancy rate and real-time status of each tenant.
FEATURES.FINANCIAL_MANAGEMENT_DESC: Automatic payment tracking, calculation of months covered, automatic reminders and dynamic statistics.
FEATURES.DIGITAL_CONTRACTS_DESC: Automatic generation of rental contracts with electronic signature and centralized management.
FEATURES.AUTOMATED_BILLING_DESC: Automatic billing, email/WhatsApp sending and synchronization with mobile payments.
FEATURES.DIRECT_CONTACT_DESC: Secure communication between tenants and owners with integrated verification system.

GETTING_STARTED.TITLE: Getting Started Guide
GETTING_STARTED.DESCRIPTION: Discover the Ndewa360° platform using user guides & videos

FAQ.TITLE: FAQ
FAQ.DESCRIPTION: Frequently asked questions if you can't find an answer

SUPPORT_CONTACT.TITLE: Support
SUPPORT_CONTACT.DESCRIPTION: Contact us if you have a specific question

CREATE_PROPERTY.TITLE: Create a property
CREATE_PROPERTY.DESCRIPTION: Create your first property and manage your finances

WHAT_IS_NDEWA.QUESTION: What is Ndewa360?
WHAT_IS_NDEWA.ANSWER: Ndewa360 is a property management and rental platform, specially designed to facilitate student housing searches with a 360° tour experience. It also allows property owners to manage rents, tenants and finances.

IS_FREE.QUESTION: Is using Ndewa360 free?
IS_FREE.ANSWER: Registration is free. All features are free for up to one property with at most 10 rental units. From the eleventh unit, you need to pay 2% of the rent for each rental unit activated per month.

TRAINING_VIDEOS.QUESTION: Where can I find training videos?
TRAINING_VIDEOS.ANSWER: All videos are available on our official YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCUoWr4IOAJnjOq-kvb-yueA.

HOW_TO_REGISTER.QUESTION: How do I register as a property owner?
HOW_TO_REGISTER.ANSWER:
You can register in just a few clicks via the home page. Once registered, you will receive a confirmation email.

Watch the video: "How to register on Ndewa360?" → https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gyin31wzg4Q

HOW_TO_CREATE_PROPERTY.QUESTION: How do I create a property?
HOW_TO_CREATE_PROPERTY.ANSWER:
Go to the "Real Estate" menu and click on "New +". Fill in the requested information.

Watch the video: "Add a property on Ndewa360 – Beginner's Guide" → https://youtu.be/WBhNszyc_Ks?si=SM9WUHKc6TV16E6L.

PROPERTY_VS_UNIT.QUESTION: What is the difference between property and unit?
PROPERTY_VS_UNIT.ANSWER: A property is a building or structure. A unit is a room, studio or apartment inside that property.

HOW_TO_ADD_UNIT.QUESTION: How do I add a unit (room, studio...)?
HOW_TO_ADD_UNIT.ANSWER:
Once the property is created, click on "Add a unit" to add your accommodations.

Watch the video: "Create a room in a property on Ndewa360 – Beginner's Guide" → https://youtu.be/-xTYP8uuKgk.

ADD_360_TOUR.QUESTION: Can I add a 360° tour myself?
ADD_360_TOUR.ANSWER: Yes, if you have a 360° video or photo. Otherwise, you can contact our team for assistance.

HOW_TO_ADD_TENANT.QUESTION: How do I add a tenant?
HOW_TO_ADD_TENANT.ANSWER: Go to the relevant unit, then click on the "Tenants" menu then on the "Add a tenant" button.

HOW_TO_RECORD_PAYMENT.QUESTION: How do I record a payment?
HOW_TO_RECORD_PAYMENT.ANSWER:
Choose the relevant property then go to the tenant list from the "Tenants" menu or to the unit list from the "Units" menu, then to the relevant tenant or unit, then click on "Add a payment". You can specify the period, amount, and more.

Watch the video: "Add a payment – Beginner's Guide" → https://youtu.be/-xTYP8uuKgk.

TENANT_NOTIFICATION.QUESTION: Does the tenant receive a notification?
TENANT_NOTIFICATION.ANSWER: Yes, a confirmation email is automatically sent to the tenant once the payment is recorded.

MONTHLY_REVENUE_TRACKING.QUESTION: Where can I track my monthly revenue?
MONTHLY_REVENUE_TRACKING.ANSWER: The financial dashboard shows you all payments, broken down by month and by property. A summary of property assets is first available on the space for all properties ("Real Estate" menu), but a complete financial dashboard is available on the "Finance" menu of each property

DOWNLOAD_DOCUMENTS.QUESTION: Can I download a contract or invoice?
DOWNLOAD_DOCUMENTS.ANSWER: Yes. You can automatically generate contracts and invoices from the tenant's profile

HOW_TO_SEARCH.QUESTION: How do I search for housing on Ndewa360?
HOW_TO_SEARCH.ANSWER: From the home page, and from the "Property Search" menu use the search engine. Filter by city, type of accommodation, price, etc.

WHAT_IS_360_TOUR.QUESTION: What is a 360° tour?
WHAT_IS_360_TOUR.ANSWER: It's an immersive view of the accommodation. You can move virtually inside as if you were there.

IS_360_TOUR_FREE.QUESTION: Do I have to pay to see the 360° tour?
IS_360_TOUR_FREE.ANSWER: No, the immersive tour is completely free

HOW_TO_CONTACT_OWNER.QUESTION: How do I contact the owner?
HOW_TO_CONTACT_OWNER.ANSWER: For a payment, you will have access to their contact details (phone, WhatsApp or email)

HOW_TO_KNOW_AVAILABILITY.QUESTION: How do I know if accommodation is still available?
HOW_TO_KNOW_AVAILABILITY.ANSWER: Only accommodations that are not yet rented appear in search results.

NO_EMAIL_RECEIVED.QUESTION: I'm not receiving emails, what should I do?
NO_EMAIL_RECEIVED.ANSWER: Check your spam folder. Otherwise, use the contact form or try again with another email.

PAYMENT_ACCESS_ISSUE.QUESTION: I made a payment but don't have access to my member area. What should I do?
PAYMENT_ACCESS_ISSUE.ANSWER: Contact our support with proof of payment. We will activate your access manually if necessary.

HOW_TO_CONTACT_SUPPORT.QUESTION: How do I contact support?
HOW_TO_CONTACT_SUPPORT.ANSWER: Via the form on the "Support" page, or by email at support@ndewa-360.com.

CONTACT_FORM.TITLE: Support Request Form
CONTACT_FORM.DESCRIPTION: Fill out this form to get free technical assistance. We guarantee complete confidentiality of the information provided to us.

HERO.SUBTITLE: A question? A project? Our team of experts is here to support you in your real estate digital transformation.

FORM.TITLE: Send us a message
FORM.SUBTITLE: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as possible

MESSAGE.LABEL: Message *
MESSAGE.PLACEHOLDER: Describe your project or question in detail...

FAQ.TITLE: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.SUBTITLE: Quickly find answers to your questions

RESPONSE_TIME.QUESTION: What is the response time?
RESPONSE_TIME.ANSWER: We typically respond within 2 hours during business hours (8am-6pm, GMT+1).

DEMO.QUESTION: Can I schedule a demo?
DEMO.ANSWER: Yes! Select "Demo request" in the form and we will schedule an appointment.

SUPPORT.QUESTION: Is support free?
SUPPORT.ANSWER: Email support is included in all our plans, even the free plan.

INTERNATIONAL.QUESTION: Do you work internationally?
INTERNATIONAL.ANSWER: Yes, we support clients throughout Africa and the African diaspora.

CTA.TITLE: Ready to transform your real estate management?
CTA.SUBTITLE: Join the 20+ property owners who already trust us
